name: HCP 7T Movie-Watching fMRI
description: The Human Connectome Project 7T movie-watching fMRI release: ~184 young adults viewed Hollywood and independent film clips. A high-field naturalistic resource often paired with HCP's rich behavioral and social-task data.
citation: Elam JS, et al. (2021). The Human Connectome Project: a retrospective. NeuroImage, 244, 118543.
